acquisition method: data-dependent acquisition of 10 tandem MS (MS/MS) scans per MS scan
cleavage agent: treated with a combination of endoproteinase LysC and trypsin to generate peptide fragments
fragmentation method: data-dependent acquisition of 10 tandem MS (MS/MS) scans per MS scan
instrument: mass spectrometer (MS) (Q Exactive HF Orbitrap; Thermo Scientific)
labeling: Mass spectrometry analysis was performed to verify the presence of NmrA and FrhB proteins in A. marina.
